title: Pan-Fried Bao with Yuzu Dipping Sauce
description: A simple Japanese-inspired dish featuring pan-fried bao and a tangy yuzu dipping sauce. This recipe is perfect for a quick snack or light meal.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
2. Add 1 tablespoon of sesame oil to the skillet and swirl to coat.
3. Place the bao in the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
4. While the bao is cooking, mix together the yuzu juice, soy sauce, and 1 tablespoon of water in a small bowl.
5. Once the bao is cooked, remove it from the skillet and place it on a plate.
6. Brush the yuzu dipping sauce onto the bao and serve immediately.
7. Garnish with chopped green onions and serve with additional yuzu dipping sauce on the side, if desired.
